summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Acadia Safe Dashboard. All core features are working correctly. Firebase Auth integration successful with both login and registration. All pages render properly with complete UI functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API health check - all 11 endpoints working
User registration functionality (created new Test Officer account)
Dashboard page renders with all stats cards, map, and widgets
Navigation to all 7 pages (Alerts, Incidents, Escorts, Broadcast, Analytics, Users, Settings)
Alerts page with filtering, view toggle, and stats display
Incidents page with search functionality and data table
Escorts page with Kanban and list view modes
Broadcast page with template selection and form functionality
Analytics page with charts and performance metrics
Users page with search and tab navigation
Settings page with comprehensive configuration options
Logout functionality returns to login page
Firestore real-time data integration (shows 0 stats as expected)
